application_run.evidence: Trace records a running local interface or capture command.

autonomous_mode.evidence: Mode appears in trace or DESIGN.md.

complete_frontend.evidence: HTML, CSS, and substantial authored source exist.

concept_inference.evidence: Synthetic recipient and expressive concept are present.

design_thesis.evidence: DESIGN.md contains a substantive design thesis.

finished_copy.evidence: Requested synthetic content is present without placeholder copy.

honest_report.evidence: Final message reports executed evidence or limitations.

refinement.evidence: Top-three review and recapture evidence found.

screenshot_inspection.evidence: Trace records visual inspection and desktop/mobile artifacts exist.

skill_activation.evidence: Codex trace contains plugin and classifier activity.

limitations: Automated evidence does not prove screen-reader usability.
Raster screenshots require manual visual privacy and quality inspection.
prompt: Make a website directed to Alex containing “You made it — Arnav”
